images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese gravure idol, showcasing a delicate balance between pure youth and avant-garde artistic elegance. She emerges from a conceptual autumn landscape, reclining gracefully atop a vibrant, textured pile of golden fallen leaves. Her wet, straight black hair clings sensuously to her shoulders and collarbone, catching the harsh, brilliant direct hard sunlight that illuminates every pore and fine vellus hair on her flawless, dewy skin. She wears a form-fitting, elegant silk dress that slips slightly off one shoulder, accentuating her slim waist and ample curves, while a sleek black choker draws attention to her slender neck. Her expression captures a gentle, knowing soft smile as she locks eyes with the lens. The background melts into a soft, dreamy bokeh, rendered in the nostalgic, warm hues of Kodak Portra 400 film. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, hyper-detailed texture, viral Instagram aesthetic.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
